inputs.text: Main raat ko bahut pasina aata hai, aur mere vajan mein kami aa rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Night sweats and weight loss are cardinal signs of TB

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, aur mere balgam mein khoon aaya hai
inputs.image_desc: patient on cot, unable to move

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Presence of blood in sputum and severe weakness confirm TB

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to presence of blood in sputum and severe symptoms

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to presence of blood in sputum and chronic symptoms
